section.summary:
Welcome to the Course

This course provides teaching resources and a platform to exchange with other teachers. It is based on this interactive open teaching and learning resource which is aligned with the Kenyan Grade 10 CBC Maths curriculum.

A student version is available to be shared with students who have access to devices. Students can practice at their own pace on "Checkpoint" questions that give instant feedback.

These materials are co-developed by INNODEMS, IDEMS, and The Kenya Mathematical Society (KMS).

Duration
6 hours
Facilitators
Dr. Michael Obiero
obiero@maseno.ac.ke
+254737456117
Zachariah Mbasu
zmbasu@innodems.org
+254722124199
Delivered jointly by INNODEMS, the Kenya Mathematical Society (KMS), and IDEMS International

This course is intended to provide teachers with resources to help teaching CBE-aligned Grade 10 mathematics, and create a forum for teachers to share resources and experiences on the delivery of the Kenyan grade 10 math.

We also have a more general course on Competency Based Education Math delivery . We suggest taking this course first if this is your first time teaching using CBE Maths.

Enhance your CBE grade 10 teaching with ease: Spend less time on preparation and more time supporting your learners!

This particular course is for Chapter [insert chapter number], Section [insert section number]: [insert section title] ([insert number of lessons] lessons).

What you will gain

  • Access to ready-to-use example lesson plans aligned with CBE
  • Access to ready-to-use step-by-step lesson guides aligned with CBE
  • Opportunities to exchange your teaching experience with other teachers

Certification

There will be a certificate at the end of this course. In order to get accreditation for this course you should participate in all forum discussions by:

  • Starting a discussion in each topic outlining your experience, and
  • Responding to at least two forum posts by your colleagues in each topic.
